approved_items.rationale: High-resolution real NLI manuscript exemplar for the initial handwritten benchmark slice.
Text-bearing historical Pinkas page that anchors the first real ledger-style benchmark slice.
Governed synthetic printed control item for deterministic smoke evaluation alongside real pages.

description: Initial fixture-backed HeOCR benchmark subset with two real release-ready exemplars and one synthetic control item.
review_bar: Every benchmark item requires explicit repo-tracked approval before inclusion, even when the item is automatically release-ready.
selection_policy: Representative mixed v1 subset: select only release-ready, explicitly approved items, covering current high-confidence real exemplars plus one governed synthetic control item.

stability_policy.churn: Avoid changing approved item membership or benchmark split commitments within benchmark_v1 unless an item becomes legally, operationally, or technically unsafe.
stability_policy.splits: Benchmark split assignments are committed per item in benchmark approval data and must match release split output.
stability_policy.versioning: Material membership or policy changes should create a new benchmark version rather than silently reshaping benchmark_v1.
